ksa_text: Conduct AI system risk classification under applicable regulatory frameworks, determining risk categories, identifying applicable requirements, selecting conformity assessment pathways, and documenting classification methodology.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-T-012 (RC, Task) maps to Citizen Data Scientist scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5351 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.535, nist_ai_rmf=0.531, ddat=0.401. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA RC-T-012 with composite 0.5351 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5351 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the RC domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. RC domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5351 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RC-domain KSA RC-T-012 (composite 0.5351) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RC domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per GDPR, CCPA, SOX; compliance competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data handling obligations, not compliance program ownership. Composite 0.5351 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RC domain KSA at composite 0.5351 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5351, domain RC. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
